title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 144.720 - Sales tax interest and penalty provisions applicable
text:
144.720.  Sales tax interest and penalty provisions applicable. — Sections 144.170, 144.220, 144.230, and 144.240, pertaining to interest on delinquent taxes, the time within which additional assessments shall be made, the time within which assessed penalties and taxes shall be paid and the procedure for requesting review of additional assessments are applicable to the assessment and payment of the tax levied by this law.
(L. 1959 H.B. 35 § 18, A.L. 1994 S.B. 477, et al.)
